  • Comfortable pants400g
  • Sleepwear300g

  • Flip-flops250g
  • Rain jacket / poncho400g
  • Quick-dry clothes300g
  • Extra socks60g
  • Waterproof footwear800g
Toiletries & Personal Care7
  • Toothbrush30g
  • Toothpaste100g
  • Soap100g
  • Shampoo150g
  • Towel300g
  • Sunscreen120g

  • Phone200g
  • Charger80g

  • Headphones180g
Documents & Money4
  • ID proof20g

  • Prescription medicines200g

  • Sunglasses40g
  • Hat / Cap80g

Smart Tips
  • Monsoon season: waterproof your electronics and documents.
